stonetop.summary: Shaggy white apes that guard their revered hoards far from any trail.

system.concept: Shaggy white apes that guard their revered hoards far from any trail.
system.description: Like orangutans but taller, more powerfully built, with thick, shaggy white hair. They dwell in small bands, in Rime Lord ruins or sacred sites far from any well-trod trails, venturing out to hunt and gather but avoiding people as much as they can. Each band collects things — a particular plant, the bones of certain animals, bits of writing, dark ice — and keeps the hoard hidden away, revered and treasured even more than their own children. Large bands keep an alpha (large, leader, +6 HP, +1 damage) who does nothing but protect it.
